title: Mineshaft Loot
quickAnswer: Mineshafts are usually worth looting if you can handle cave spiders. They mix decent chest rewards with useful free materials like rails, wood, and string.
keyFacts: Common reasons to clear a mineshaft are rails, name tags, seeds, enchanted books, and easy cave access.
Cave spider spawners make cramped sections more dangerous than a normal overworld cave.
Mineshafts also expose a lot of ore and side tunnels, so the structure can pay off even beyond chest loot.
commonMistakes: Rushing through webs and poison-heavy corridors without enough blocks and torches.
Ignoring how much free rail and wood the structure provides.
